name: Deck Swabbie
description: An Able-Bodied Seaman (Swabbie): part of the majority of the crew. Though they normally handle manual labor such as scrubbing the decks or trimming the sails, when docked the Deck Swabbie is tasked with standing guard on deck. Ensuring no unauthorised being gets on or off board.
text:
Deck Swabbie
Medium Humanoid (human), Neutral
AC 12 (Leather Armor)
HP 11 (2d8 + 2)
Speed 30 ft.
MOD SAVE
Str 11 +0 +0
Dex 12 +1 +1
Con 12 +1 +1
Int 10 +0 +0
Wis 10 +0 +0
Cha 10 +0 +0
Skills Acrobatics +3
Senses Passive Perception 10
Languages Common
CR 1 (PB +2)
Actions
Scimitar. Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 +1) slashing damage.
Crossbow (light). Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 80-320 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.

name: Bosun
description: Boatswain (Bosun): The manager of the ship's maintenance. They supervise rigging, anchors, and sails. Among the crew they're also known as jailer as they're in charge of administering and handling punishments.
text:
Bosun
Medium Humanoid (human), Neutral
AC 14 (leather armor)
HP 33 (6d8 + 6)
Speed 30 ft.
MOD SAVE
Str 10 +0 +0
Dex 16 +3 +3
Con 12 +1 +1
Int 12 +1 +1
Wis 12 +1 +1
Cha 10 +0 +0
Skills Intimidation +2, Insight +3
Senses Passive Perception 11
Languages Common
CR 4 (PB +2)
Traits
Multiattack. Can make two melee attacks (e.g., Dagger or Scimitar) on their turn. It can exchange one of its attacks to use its nets.
Actions
Scimitar. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 +3) slashing damage.
Crossbow (light). Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 80-320 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage (loading, no multiattack possible).
Dagger. Melee/Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5-20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 +3) piercing damage.
Net. Instead of making a second attack, the Bosun can throw one of its nets without disadvantage (before or after the first attack). Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5-15 ft., one target. Hit: target becomes restrained
Bonus Actions
Swashbuckler's Footwork. Dash, Disengage, or Hide.
Reactions
Parry. It can parry a single attack as a reaction by adding its PB (+2) to its AC.

name: Below Deck Swabbie
description: An Able-Bodied Seaman (Swabbie): part of the majority of the crew. Though they normally handle manual labor such as scrubbing the decks or trimming the sails, when docked the Below Deck Swabbie is tasked with standing guard below deck. Ensuring no unauthorised being gets beyond them, they guard the goods and sometimes the prisoners.

Cha 10 +0 +0
Skills Intimidation +2
Senses Passive Perception 10
Languages Common
CR 2 (PB +2)
Actions
Scimitar. Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 1) slashing damage.
Bonus Actions
Dagger. Melee/Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5-20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) piercing damage.
